queue.title: Payment Device QA Engineer
queue.description: Role: QA/Technical Analyst - Payment Systems (Ingenico/Castles) Location: SFO or Pleasonton, CA [Remote] Duration: 06 Months Need Skills: Ingenico/Castles & Payment Terminal Experience Job Summary: We are seeking a detail-oriented QA / Technical Support Engineer with experience in payment systems and terminal management. The ideal candidate will have hands-on knowledge of payment terminals (preferably Ingenico or Castles Technology), strong troubleshooting skills, and the ability to analyze log…

queue.title: QA Automation Engineer
queue.description: This is a remote position. We are looking for a QA Automation Engineer with strong experience in Playwright automation, API testing, integration testing, and excellent communication skills. The candidate should be able to build and maintain automation frameworks, validate end-to-end business workflows, and collaborate effectively with technical and business teams.
